hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|json)$' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A source file was just edited. If this change is significant (new feature, removed feature, changed behavior, updated folder structure, changed dependencies), update CLAUDE.md to reflect it."}}' || true; } 2>/dev/null || true
